pinpoint.gcmchannel.ApiKey.Docs: The Web API key, also called the *server key*, that you received from Google to communicate with Google services.

pinpoint.gcmchannel.ApplicationId.Docs: The unique identifier for the Amazon Pinpoint application that the GCM channel applies to.

pinpoint.gcmchannel.Enabled.Docs: Specifies whether to enable the GCM channel for the Amazon Pinpoint application.
